caption: Two identical Spearmen-vs-Infantry standoffs, side by side, both taking comparable losses (24 -> 15 soldiers each by tick 720). The left Spearmen keeps the new default file_major_reform: by tick 720 one file has thinned to a single rank while its neighbors still hold two or three -- a persistent, jagged dent that stayed put from around tick 360 onward. The right Spearmen opts out (file_major_reform: false, the historical behavior): its rear reflows and re-centres every tick instead, so no single file stays shallow for long -- every file sits within one rank of every other the whole clip through.
